basic_details.job_title: ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Block Technology Manager and Assistant Technology Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Block Technology Manager (BTM) & Assistant Technology Manager (ATM)
basic_details.short_information: Office of the Project Director, Agricultural Technology Management Agency (ATMA), Nicobar District (ATMA Nicobar) Block Technology Manager (BTM) & Assistant Technology Manager (ATM) Notification 2026 has been released in July 2026 on the official website https://andamannicobar.gov.in/. A total of 08 vacancies have been announced through the ATMA Nicobar Block Technology Manager (BTM) & Assistant Technology Manager (ATM) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Age Limit: Maximum 45 years (as on last date of application). Educational Qualification & Experience: As mentioned in the vacancy table above. Nationality: Candidates must be eligible to work in Andaman & Nicobar Islands.

vacancy_details.Qualification: PG in Agri./Allied Sector with computer skills OR Agri. Graduate with 3 years as ATM
vacancy_details.Experience: Min. 2 years in Agri. related activities
Preferably 1 year in Agri. related activities

post_wise_breakdown.qualification: PG in Agri./Allied Sector with computer skills OR Agri. Graduate with 3 years as ATM
post_wise_breakdown.experience: Min. 2 years in Agri. related activities
Preferably 1 year in Agri. related activities

how_to_apply: Candidates must submit the application offline in the prescribed format.
Download or obtain the prescribed Application Form from the notification.
Fill the application form neatly in Block letters with all required details.
Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the form.
Attach self-attested copies of: Educational qualification certificates & mark sheets Experience certificates Date of Birth proof Category certificate (if applicable) Local certificate (if any)
Submit the complete application to: Office of Assistant Director (Agri.), Perka, Car Nicobar, Nicobar District on or before 01-08-2026.
The list of eligible candidates will be displayed on the notice board on 07-08-2026.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be provided for appearing in Written Exam/Interview. Appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Candidates must be ready to work in remote/hard areas of Nicobar District. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. No accommodation facility will be provided.

content_sections.heading: ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Office of the Project Director (ATMA), Nicobar District has released the Notice of Vacancy for engagement of contractual staff for implementation of ATMA programmes. The notification contains details of posts, qualifications, experience, remuneration, and application procedure. Download ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.atma_nicobar_andaman_nicobar_islands: Support to State Extension Programme for Extension Reforms (ATMA)
Block Technology Manager (BTM) & Assistant Technology Manager (ATM)

content_sections.heading: ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Note: Agri/Allied Subjects include Agriculture, Horticulture, Agricultural Engineering, Dairy Technology, Forestry, Veterinary & Animal Science, Food Technology, Biotechnology, Fisheries, Sericulture, Home Science, Community Science, and Food Nutrition & Dietetics. Educational qualification and experience may be relaxed for already deployed contractual manpower.

rows.qualification: PG in Agri./Allied Sector with computer skills OR Agri. Graduate with 3 years as ATM
rows.experience: Min. 2 years in Agri. related activities
Preferably 1 year in Agri. related activities

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Age Limit: Maximum 45 years (as on last date of application). Educational Qualification & Experience: As mentioned in the vacancy table above. Nationality: Candidates must be eligible to work in Andaman & Nicobar Islands.

content_sections.heading: ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit the application offline in the prescribed format. Step-by-Step Application Process: Download or obtain the prescribed Application Form from the notification. Fill the application form neatly in Block letters with all required details. Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the form. Attach self-attested copies of: Educational qualification certificates & mark sheets Experience certificates Date of Birth proof Category certificate (if applicable) Local certificate (if any) Submit the complete application to: Office of Assistant Director (Agri.), Perka, Car Nicobar, Nicobar District on or before 01-08-2026. The list of eligible candidates will be displayed on the notice board on 07-08-2026.

content_sections.heading: ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be provided for appearing in Written Exam/Interview. Appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Candidates must be ready to work in remote/hard areas of Nicobar District. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. No accommodation facility will be provided.

content_sections.heading: General Information
content_sections.text: Selected candidates shall have to work in any part of Nicobar District. Leave rules will be as per contractual appointment norms. The decision of the competent authority will be final.

content_sections.heading: ATMA Nicobar Block Technology Manager and Assistant Technology Manager Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for District ATMA Nicobar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 01 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. 2. How many vacancies are there in ATMA Nicobar for Block Technology Manager and Assistant Technology Manager?
faq.answer: 2 posts of Block Technology Manager and 6 posts of Assistant Technology Manager (total 8 posts, subject to variation).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Block Technology Manager in ATMA Nicobar?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Assistant Technology Manager in ATMA Nicobar?
faq.answer: Graduate or Post Graduate degree in Agriculture or Allied Sectors.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for ATMA Nicobar contractual posts?
faq.answer: Maximum 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ATMA Nicobar BTM and ATM posts?
faq.answer: Submit the filled application form with all documents to the Office of Assistant Director (Agri.), Perka, Car Nicobar on or before 01-08-2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is experience mandatory for Block Technology Manager post?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 2 years field experience in Agriculture related activities is required.

faq.question: Q8. Will there be a written exam for ATMA Nicobar recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, eligible candidates will be called for Written Examination/Interview based on merit.

faq.question: Q9. Is this ATMA Nicobar recruitment permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: It is purely contractual and does not guarantee regular appointment.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected candidates for ATMA Nicobar have to work?
faq.answer: Candidates must be ready to work in any part of Nicobar District, including remote areas.
